_note: Label Sprint round for golgi — generated golgi_illus.webp, cropped/keyed dark mode.
alt: Golgi apparatus with cisternae and vesicles
caption: Tap each label, then tap where it belongs on the Golgi apparatus.

hotspots.label: Cis face
hotspots.detail: The forming face, nearest the endoplasmic reticulum; receives incoming vesicles.

hotspots.label: Cisterna
hotspots.detail: One of the stacked, flattened membranous sacs that make up the Golgi body.

hotspots.label: Trans face
hotspots.detail: The maturing face, facing the plasma membrane; ships out finished vesicles.

hotspots.label: Transport vesicle
hotspots.detail: A small membrane sac budding off to carry proteins to their destination.

generation_prompt: Golgi apparatus, 3D detail showing internal structure
